builds_on.name: agentic RAG
builds_on.evidence: “HiPRAG, a Hierarchical Process reward framework for agentic RAG”

builds_on.name: reinforcement learning
builds_on.evidence: “we introduce Hierarchical Process Rewards for Efficient agentic RAG (HiPRAG), a novel training methodology that incorporates a fine-grained, knowledge-grounded process reward into the RL training”
